title: Lower Shields
description:
Lower Shields lowers the shield in first-person view, giving you better visibility while playing.
Perfect for PvP and general gameplay, as it keeps your screen clearer.
body: **Lower Shields** is a **resource pack** that lowers the shield in **first-person** view, giving you better visibility while playing. It makes **PvP** and **general** gameplay more comfortable by keeping your screen **clearer** without changing any game mechanics.
